# Sastho Lanka

Sastho Lanka is a home and kitchen goods retailer in Sri Lanka - ceramics (hero
category), cookware, kitchen storage, home decor, glassware and small appliances.
Retail and wholesale. Island-wide cash-on-delivery.

Showroom: 84 Maliban Street, Pettah, Colombo 11, Sri Lanka
Phone / WhatsApp: +94 77 767 5984
Instagram / TikTok: @sastho.lk

Key pages:
- https://businessboosterlk.github.io/sastho/ (home)
- https://businessboosterlk.github.io/sastho/shop.html (shop)
- https://businessboosterlk.github.io/sastho/deals.html (deals)
- https://businessboosterlk.github.io/sastho/faq.html (FAQ)
- https://businessboosterlk.github.io/sastho/contact.html (contact)
